nasb.text: Then Jacob arose from Beersheba; and the sons of Israel carried their father Jacob and their little ones and their wives in the wagons which Pharaoh had sent to carry him.

esv.text: Then Jacob set out from Beersheba. The sons of Israel carried Jacob their father, their little ones, and their wives, in the wagons that Pharaoh had sent to carry him.

cnv.text: 雅各就從別是巴起程。以色列的眾子，用法老為雅各送來的車輛，接載他們的父親雅各，以及他們的孩子和妻子。

ccb.text: 于是，雅各从别示巴启程。以色列的儿子们带着父亲和妻儿，乘坐法老送来的车，

csbs.text: 雅各就从比尔-谢巴起程。以色列的众子让他们的父亲雅各，以及他们的孩子和妻子坐上了法老送来的车辆。
